entity.summary: Hyperliquid-native automated-market-maker exchange with V2 constant-product and V3 concentrated-liquidity pools, current swap activity, and multiple fee tiers.
entity.notes: The official organization publishes current non-archived V2 and V3 protocol repositories. Current independently tracked V3 swaps and volume support an active classification. A distinct first-party web domain was not confirmed, so the official organization is used as the identity surface and confidence remains medium.

evidence.title: Hyperlynx official GitHub organization
evidence.notes: Official organization publishes non-archived V2 core, V3 core, and V3 periphery protocol repositories under the Hyperlynx identity.

evidence.title: Hyperlynx V3 current DEX volume profile
evidence.notes: Current independently maintained profile reports Hyperliquid V3 swap volume, concentrated-liquidity fee tiers, and protocol and LP fee shares.
